title: RegulatorExtension
description: Category extension for voltage regulators (LDO, switching, charge pump, isolated). Layered on top of base per spec §7. Version 0.3 — many fields may be added in v0.x.

topology.description: Regulator topology. Flat vocabulary per spec §7 — subtype folded into the enum.

vin_range.description: Input voltage operating range. Typically a single SpecValue with min/max populated.

vout_range.description: Output voltage range (fixed parts: single value; adjustable: min→max).

iout_max.description: Maximum output current. May carry multiple SpecValues for different conditions (ambient temp, package variants).

reference_voltage.description: Feedback reference voltage (adjustable parts only). Consumed by FS-001 and FB divider math.

feedback_pin.description: Pin number where the feedback input lives. Must resolve to base.pinout[*].numbers.

compensation_pin.description: Pin number for the external compensation network (when topology is externally-compensated).

enable_pin.description: Pin number of the EN/SHDN input. null for parts without an enable pin.

power_good_pin.description: Pin number of the PGOOD output. null for parts without power-good.

cin_min.description: Minimum input-capacitor value required for stable operation (datasheet app-info). Consumed by EX-001.

cout_min.description: Minimum output-capacitor value required for stability.

inductor_range.description: Recommended inductor value range (switching topologies only; null for LDO/charge-pump).

dropout.description: Dropout voltage (LDO only). null for switching topologies.

psrr.description: Power-supply rejection ratio across frequency. May carry multiple SpecValues for different frequencies.

stability_conditions.description: Output-capacitor stability window. Consumed by SV-001.

cap_types_allowed.description: Output-capacitor technology families this regulator is stable with. Closed vocabulary covers Class 1 (c0g/np0, temperature-stable), Class 2 ceramic (x5r/x7r/x7s), and bulk types. Adding a family requires a minor schema bump.

esr_range.description: Permitted output-capacitor ESR window for stable operation. null when datasheet doesn't publish an ESR constraint (modern ceramic-friendly LDOs).

page.description: PDF page number (1-based) where the fact was sourced.

section.description: Datasheet section label (e.g. '6.4 Electrical Characteristics') when available.

confidence.description: Extractor confidence in this fact. Pivots consumer trust gating.

method.description: How the fact was captured. 'table' = parameter table. 'prose' = narrative text. 'curve' = read off a graph. 'calculated' / 'derived' = inferred from other facts.

sequencing.description: Power-on sequencing requirements (when this rail must come up relative to others). Consumed by ST-001.

must_rise_after.description: Rail names this rail must come up after.

must_rise_before.description: Rail names this rail must come up before.

max_inter_rail_delay.description: Maximum allowed time gap between the rail this rail depends on and this rail coming into regulation. Consumed by ST-001 when the datasheet publishes an explicit max-delay constraint.

page.description: PDF page number (1-based) where the fact was sourced.

section.description: Datasheet section label (e.g. '6.4 Electrical Characteristics') when available.

confidence.description: Extractor confidence in this fact. Pivots consumer trust gating.

method.description: How the fact was captured. 'table' = parameter table. 'prose' = narrative text. 'curve' = read off a graph. 'calculated' / 'derived' = inferred from other facts.
